title: The U.K. and France Deploy Some Forces to the Mideast Despite Misgivings About Iran Attacks
summary_full: The two nations, as well as Greece, said they would send assets to the region. The Netherlands was weighing a request to join them.
summary_public: The two nations, as well as Greece, said they would send assets to the region. The Netherlands was weighing a request to join them.
